description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge extension on the right side, designed for comfort and spacious seating. The sofa features three main seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be thick and plush, providing ample support. The armrests are straight, padded, and of medium height, seamlessly integrated into the overall rectangular silhouette of the sofa. The upholstery is a solid, uniform gray fabric with a matte finish, giving it a contemporary and understated look suitable for urban environments. The base of the sofa is low and continuous, with no visible legs, suggesting a sturdy and grounded construction. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements or patterns.
description: A modern L-shaped gray sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, featuring plush seat and back cushions, straight padded armrests, and a low, continuous base. The upholstery is solid gray with a matte, smooth finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat and back cushions, and the chaise lounge extending to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the straight, padded armrest on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unbroken backrest and the sofa's solid, rectangular form.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the main seating area and the right-side armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, uniform seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all attached and evenly spaced; chaise section forms a continuous cushion with the main seating area.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests of medium height, integrated into the sofa's rectangular profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the base appears solid and continuous, suggesting a recessed or hidden leg design for a grounded look.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three attached, plush cushions; no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
